structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-03-19 Borrower Initiated ROV Eliminated
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-03-19 13:29:47-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

 

Effective immediately, HUD has rescinded the borrower-initiated ROV process that NOVA implemented on 10/21/2024.  NOVA will return to the Underwriter initiated ROV process.  

 

See below from the HUD Mortgagee Letter 2025-08 (attached):

 

On January 20, 2025, the President issued Executive Orders aimed at

reversing policies that have adversely affected key sectors, including the housing market. As part of this ongoing effort, FHA is focused on eliminating policies that have created barriers, increased regulatory and financial burdens, and deepened disparities in lending practices.

 

Rescinding the policy announced in these MLs is a step in aligning with the Administration’s broader goal to reduce unnecessary regulatory burden and foster long-term economic stability for all Americans.

 

The Corporate office is working to remove the ROV disclosures from the initial package and the second notice that goes with the appraisal.

 

Attachments

*	Mortgagee Letter 2025-08

 

 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>  
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
